parameters.jsCode: return { json: $input.first().json };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ session_id: $json.session_id || $json.state?.session_id, session_state: { session_id: $json.session_id, agent: $json.agent, task: $json.task, config: $json.config, state: $json.state }, checkpoint_name: $json.action_input?.name || 'default' }) }}

={
  "request_id": "{{ $json.deduplication?.request_id || 'unknown' }}",
  "original_task": {{ JSON.stringify($json.task) }},
  "error": "{{ $json.error_message || 'Unknown error' }}",
  "retry_count": {{ $json.retry_count || 0 }},
  "max_retries": 3,
  "next_retry_at": "{{ new Date(Date.now() + 60000).toISOString() }}",
  "created_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

={
  "action": "request_completed",
  "request_id": "{{ $json.deduplication?.request_id || 'unknown' }}",
  "success": {{ $json.success !== false }},
  "duration_ms": {{ Date.now() - new Date($json.deduplication?.first_seen || Date.now()).getTime() }},
  "tool_calls": {{ $json.state?.cost_tracker?.tool_calls || 0 }},
  "tokens_used": {{ ($json.state?.cost_tracker?.input_tokens || 0) + ($json.state?.cost_tracker?.output_tokens || 0) }},
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
